data.name: Tentacaliens: Making Ends Meet in a New World
data.detailed_description:
A long time ago, in a galaxy far, far away there exists a Galactic Empire ruled by Emperor Paipatine the 6969th. The Empire has been warring with rebels for many years, and both sides desperately desire something to boost their spirits from the fighting... And that's where our hero steps in. Squid Inkwell, a tentacalien, is itching for his opportunity to conquer another planet to expand his species's joy-bringing enterprise, and that time has finally come.

Capture the people of Earth using your powers as a tentacalien, putting them to work at your operation in order to pay your dues to the Galactic Empire and take over the planet. Also, don't forget the most important thing... placing the top brass of the world under your feeler!

Gotta Abduct Them All!

There are plenty of people on Earth, each drawn beautifully, to capture and put to work.

Visual Novel Mechanics

Whether you'd like to skip dialogue you've already read, or want to bring up a log of previous lines to check what you may have missed, this game has the staples of the genre.

Whether you'd like to skip dialogue you've already read, or want to bring up a log of previous lines to check what you may have missed, this game has the staples of the genre.
data.short_description: Invade the primitive planet of Earth, setting up a profitable business, abducting its inhabitants, and ultimately conquering the planet.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
